target: Full Test Enhanced Feedback System - Rich Feedback like Cambridge Tests

summary.overall_result: All 19 backend API tests pass. POST /api/full-test/complete returns rich feedback data including skill_breakdown, fastest_gain, teacher_feedback (Turkish), integrity_warnings, reason_summary, and question_results with reason_code/explanation/skill_tip. GET /api/full-test/sets returns all 8 academic sets. Reason codes correctly classify UNANSWERED, SPELLING_ERROR, and WRONG_ANSWER. Frontend FullTestResults.js has all required UI components with proper data-testid attributes. Code review confirms all Cambridge-style feedback sections are implemented.

features_tested.details: Returns academic_set_a_01 through academic_set_h_01 with correct metadata
Accepts listening answers and returns comprehensive evaluation
Returns array with skill_id, label, correct, total, and tip per question type
Returns top 3 areas for improvement sorted by wrong_count
Returns warning with section, count, and message when questions left blank
Returns dict with UNANSWERED, SPELLING_ERROR, WRONG_ANSWER counts
Each question has question_id, question_type, user_answer, correct_answer, is_correct, reason_code, explanation, skill_tip
Blank answers correctly classified as UNANSWERED
'penicilln' vs 'penicillin' correctly classified as SPELLING_ERROR
Incorrect answers classified as WRONG_ANSWER or NEAR_MISS
40/40 = Band 9.0, 24/40 = Band 6.0 (based on IELTS scale)
Returns short and detailed feedback in Turkish when LLM key is configured
Returns list of recommended lessons based on weak skill areas
Empty answers dict returns success with empty sections
data-testid='overall-score-card' with band score display
data-testid='integrity-warnings' displays unanswered warnings
data-testid='reason-summary-card' with color-coded reason chips
data-testid='fastest-gain-card' shows top 3 improvement areas
data-testid='teacher-feedback-card' with Turkish feedback
data-testid='recommended-lessons-card' with lesson navigation

features_tested.feature: Frontend FullTestResults.js - question details with expand/collapse
features_tested.details: QuestionResultsSection component with evidence_text, explanation, skill_tip

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code review verified - all data-testid attributes present)

test_credentials: N/A - API testing done with public endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing academic_set_e_01 test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full Test feedback system is complete with Cambridge-style rich feedback. Backend imports helper functions from routes/cambridge.py (classify_reason_code, compare_answers, get_skill_tip, etc.). Frontend FullTestResults.js renders all feedback sections. Teacher feedback is generated in Turkish via LLM. Test with academic_set_e_01 using mixed answers (correct, wrong, blank, spelling errors) to see all reason codes.
